mapper.sql: select c.config_id, c.dept_id, c.contract_no, c.api_id, c.api_key, c.contract_type, c.status, c.expire_date, c.remark, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, d.dept_name, d.leader as dept_leader, d.phone as dept_phone, case when c.expire_date is null then null when c.expire_date < curdate() then '已过期' when c.expire_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval 30 day) then '即将过期' else '正常' end as expire_status, datediff(c.expire_date, curdate()) as days_remaining from sys_dept_api_config c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.select: where c.status = '1' and c.api_id is not null and c.api_id != '' and c.api_key is not null and c.api_key != '' and (c.expire_date is null or c.expire_date >= curdate()) order by c.dept_id, c.config_id
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_dept_api_config
dept_id, contract_no, api_id, api_key, contract_type, status, expire_date, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{deptId}, #{contractNo}, #{apiId}, #{apiKey}, #{contractType}, #{status}, #{expireDate}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_dept_api_config where config_id in
#{configId}

if.test: contractType != null and contractType != '' and contractType != 'unset'

mapper.select:
select c.status as name, count(*) as value from sys_dept_api_config c
and c.dept_id in
#{deptId}
group by c.status

select case when c.expire_date is null then '未设置' when c.expire_date < curdate() then '已过期' when c.expire_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval 30 day) then '即将过期' else '正常' end as name, count(*) as value from sys_dept_api_config c
and c.dept_id in
#{deptId}
group by case when c.expire_date is null then '未设置' when c.expire_date < curdate() then '已过期' when c.expire_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval 30 day) then '即将过期' else '正常' end

select date_format(c.expire_date, '%Y-%m') as name, count(*) as value from sys_dept_api_config c
c.expire_date is not null and c.expire_date >= curdate() and c.expire_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval #{months} month)
and c.dept_id in
#{deptId}
group by date_format(c.expire_date, '%Y-%m') order by name

select d.province as name, count(*) as value from sys_dept_api_config c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id
d.province is not null and d.province != ''
and c.dept_id in
#{deptId}
group by d.province order by value desc

select case when d.province in ('北京市', '上海市', '天津市', '重庆市') and d.city = d.province then if(d.area is null or d.area = '', d.province, concat(d.province, '-', d.area)) else concat(d.province, '-', d.city) end as name, count(*) as value from sys_dept_api_config c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id
d.province is not null and d.province != '' and d.city is not null and d.city != ''
and c.dept_id in
#{deptId}
group by case when d.province in ('北京市', '上海市', '天津市', '重庆市') and d.city = d.province then if(d.area is null or d.area = '', d.province, concat(d.province, '-', d.area)) else concat(d.province, '-', d.city) end order by value desc limit 15
